meaning: World Boxing Association,世界拳击联合会
examples: The system determines the WBA and MBA.
The system uses high quarter wages to calculate WBA.
That's the WBA title, which is currently held by David Haye.
On the undercard, Colombian Cesar Canchila outpointed Giovanni Segura to claim the WBA interim light-flyweight championship.
Re-energised, Jones knocked Griffin out in a single round to claim the WBA light-heavyweight crown.
